arts.ttl: Big week – and a big summer ahead – for QPR
arts.sum: West London Sport’s David McIntyre is joined by former QPR striker Kevin Gallen for the latest podcast. Why are Rangers struggling again? And what can be done to turn things around? The podcast can also be downloaded on Spotify or Apple. The post Big week – and a big summer ahead – for QPR appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Preview: Queens Park Rangers vs. Cardiff City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Queens Park Rangers and Cardiff City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
